mapper.insert: INSERT INTO images (user_id, storage_path, original_filename, content_type, size_bytes, content_hash) VALUES (#{userId}, #{storagePath}, #{originalFilename}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{contentHash})
mapper.select: SELECT img.id, img.external_id, img.user_id, img.storage_path, img.original_filename, img.content_type, img.size_bytes, img.content_hash, img.created_at FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1

SELECT img.id, img.external_id, img.user_id, img.storage_path, img.original_filename, img.content_type, img.size_bytes, img.content_hash, img.created_at FROM stock_images si JOIN images img ON img.id = si.image_id WHERE si.stock_id = #{stockId} ORDER BY si.is_primary DESC, si.display_order, si.created_at LIMIT 1
SELECT id, external_id, user_id, storage_path, original_filename, content_type, size_bytes, content_hash, created_at FROM images WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND content_hash = #{contentHash}
